name: Orange Butter Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup light brown sugar, firmly packed
2 tablespoons Grand Marnier or other orange-flavored liqueur
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine the first 12 ingredients. Beat at low speed with an electric mixer until blended.
2. Increase speed to high and beat for 3 minutes more.
3. Pour batter evenly into two greased and floured 8 1/2 x 4 1/2 x 3-inch loaf pans.
4. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 45 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
5. Remove from the pans and let cool on wire racks for 10 minutes. Then, turn off the heat and remove completely from the pans to cool on wire racks.
6. Frost with Tropical Cheese Spread if desired.
Yield: 2 loaves
Tropical Cheese Spread
1. In a small saucepan, combine the first three ingredients. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
2. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 8 minutes or until the fruit is soft.
3. Drain well in a fine-mesh sieve set over a bowl.
4. Beat cream cheese at medium speed with an electric mixer until creamy.
5. Add marmalade, and beat until blended.
6. Fold in the drained fruit mixture.
Yield: 3 1/2 cups
